name: Semrush
tagline: All-in-one SEO, PPC, and content marketing platform
description: Semrush is a comprehensive digital marketing platform covering SEO, PPC, social media, and content marketing. Known for its keyword research database, advertising intelligence, and competitive analysis tools — popular with agencies and in-house marketers.
pros: Broadest feature set of any SEO tool
cons: Some data less accurate than Ahrefs for backlinks
use_cases: You run PPC campaigns alongside SEO and need competitor ad intelligence, CPC data, and keyword overlap in one platform
Your agency needs to manage 15+ client projects with rank tracking, site audits, and white-label reporting all in one subscription
You want to research competitors' organic and paid strategies — including their ad copy, landing pages, and display spend
Your in-house marketing team needs a single tool covering keyword research, backlink analysis, and content optimisation without juggling multiple subscriptions
